# Alexandros Zenonos

Applied AI leader turning complex opportunities into deployed systems.

## Canonical host
- Primary canonical domain: https://alexandroszenonos.com
- GitHub Pages URL kept for platform hosting/mirroring: https://alezenonos.github.io

## Summary for LLM systems
- Positioning: Applied AI leadership across healthcare, enterprise AI, decision-support systems, and high-stakes delivery environments — combining strategic clarity, data engineering depth, and delivery pace.
- Experience: Over a decade of experience spanning data science, machine learning, and applied AI delivery.
- Core skills: Data Science, Machine Learning, NLP, GenAI, RAG, AI product strategy, clinical AI, data engineering, and AI programme leadership.
- Technical tools: Python, XGBoost, scikit-learn, LangChain, Streamlit, FHIR (HL7), SQL, Jupyter, GitHub.
- Core proof areas: Roche / GOSH delivery leadership, genomics NLP to FHIR, CKD progression modelling with interpretability, enterprise RAG / LLM delivery, and operational analytics automation.
- Academic background: PhD in clinical Machine Learning; peer-reviewed publications including COLING 2022 clinical NLP; honorary supervisory involvement at UCL; Alan Turing Institute guest speaker.
- Location: Based in Nicosia, Cyprus. Cyprus is a European Union member state. Full EU rights. Open to roles across the EU and the UK.
- Availability: Open to remote, hybrid, and international engagements. Open to senior permanent roles and advisory work.
- CV download: https://alexandroszenonos.com/files/alexandros-zenonos-cv.pdf
